query:
SELECT pt.external_id, pt.receipt_no, pt.amount, pt.paid_at,
       JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.payment_id') AS payment_id,
       JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS bad_debt_amount,
       JSON_EXTRACT(pt.raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS close_installment_amount
FROM payment_transactions pt
JOIN contracts c ON c.external_id = pt.contract_external_id
WHERE c.contract_no = 'CT0225-LRI001-9357-01'
ORDER BY pt.paid_at ASC;
